articles.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: Short-term outlook remains constructive
articles.expand: The Australian Dollar (AUD) remains firm amid elevated domestic inflation and the hawkish stance from the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA). This combination maintains the door open for AUD/USD to go up even more, and it also helps to protect against occasional pullbacks.
